inputs.title: Add localization coverage for new navigation strings
inputs.description: Wire i18n for newly added side-nav entitlement prompts across supported locales without breaking reconnect status handling.

context.priorFindings: Incomplete locale dictionaries; reconnect sentinel compared to translated text.

rubric.criterion: Large surface is split into independently verifiable locale and status-handling deliverables before another full review round.
Acceptance contract names locale completeness criteria and forbids comparing reconnect logic to translated strings.
Resolved reviewer findings are not reintroduced in later rounds.

provenance.source: Pattern-synthesized from multi-round code-feature review using tests/fixtures/reviewer-verdict-multiline-evidence.md patterns.
provenance.notes: Synthetic decomposition case shaped by multi-round review patterns. Uses tests/fixtures/reviewer-verdict-multiline-evidence.md for offline replay only — not a captured transcript and not linked to a live task/run id. Pairs with locale-acceptance-contract.
